topicTitle: Man and Medicine: Towards Health for All

images.alt: Timeline summarizing the evolution from ancient medicine to modern public health
images.caption: The chapter's long chronology compressed into a single studyable timeline.
images.purpose: Shows the shift from supernatural beliefs to scientific medicine, primary health care, and SDGs in one glance.

images.alt: Framework showing health concepts, dimensions, and determinants around the core concept of health
images.caption: A map of how concepts, dimensions, and determinants fit together.
images.purpose: Helps readers see that health is multidimensional and shaped by several determinants, not just disease absence.

topicTitle: Analytical Epidemiology: Case Control, Cohort, Cross-Sectional, and Ecological Studies

images.alt: Comparison chart for case control, cohort, cross sectional, and ecological study designs
images.caption: A quick way to separate direction, use-case, and measure of each analytical study design.
images.purpose: Reduces confusion between study designs by placing them in one comparison view.

topicTitle: Infectious Disease Epidemiology, Transmission Dynamics, and Disease Control

images.alt: Circular chain of infection showing agent, reservoir, portal of exit, transmission, portal of entry, and susceptible host
images.caption: The classic chain of infection with the points where prevention can break transmission.
images.purpose: Turns a long set of transmission definitions into a memorable control-oriented model.

topicTitle: Immunization, Cold Chain, National Immunization Schedule, and AEFI

images.alt: Cold chain ladder from national store to vaccination session site with temperature band and equipment examples
images.caption: A route map for how vaccines move safely from stores to the vaccination session.
images.purpose: Makes the cold-chain hierarchy and equipment easier to retain than reading the levels as plain text.

topicTitle: Environment and Health: Water Purification & Quality

images.alt: Flowchart showing large scale water purification with storage filtration chlorination and safe distribution
images.caption: Large-scale purification as a sequence rather than a scattered list of steps.
images.purpose: Clarifies the order of purification steps and how filtration and chlorination fit together.
images.anchorText: PURIFICATION OF WATER ON LARGE SCALE

images.alt: Four color segregation guide for yellow red white and blue biomedical waste categories
images.caption: The BMW color-code chart learners usually need to recall fast in exams and practice.
images.purpose: Supports high-stakes recall for segregation color coding and disposal pathways.
images.anchorText: BIOMEDICAL WASTE CATEGORIES AND SEGREGATION (2016 GUIDELINES)

images.alt: Disaster management cycle showing mitigation preparedness response and recovery
images.caption: The disaster cycle shown as a loop so the phases do not get memorized as disconnected bullets.
images.purpose: Reinforces the cyclic nature of disaster management and the handoff between phases.

topicTitle: Introduction to Biostatistics, Types of Data, Variables, and Scales of Measurement

images.alt: Flowchart for qualitative and quantitative types of data
images.caption: A classification view for data types and scales of measurement.
images.purpose: Improves distinction between qualitative and quantitative data branches.

images.alt: Comparison of common statistical charts and data presentation methods
images.caption: A visual chooser for which chart fits which kind of data.
images.purpose: Helps learners select the right diagram faster during revision.
images.anchorText: CHARTS AND DIAGRAMS FOR QUALITATIVE DATA

topicTitle: Measures of Central Tendency and Measures of Dispersion

images.alt: Comparison image for mean median and mode
images.caption: A compact way to remember when mean, median, and mode are most useful.
images.purpose: Supports rapid comparison of central tendency measures.
images.anchorText: Application of Central Tendency by Scale of Measurement

topicTitle: Z-Score, Normal Distribution Curve, and Skewness

images.alt: Normal distribution curve with one two and three standard deviations marked
images.caption: The bell curve with the usual 68-95-99.7 rule marked visually.
images.purpose: Makes SD bands and skewness cues faster to recognize.

topicTitle: Hypothesis Testing, P-Value, Errors, Power of a Test, and Confidence Intervals

images.alt: Hypothesis testing diagram explaining null hypothesis, p value, alpha, beta, and power
images.caption: A visual summary of Type I error, Type II error, and power.
images.purpose: Reduces the common confusion between alpha, beta, and p-value language.

images.alt: Scatter plots showing positive negative and no correlation with a regression line example
images.caption: A pattern-recognition aid for correlation direction and regression intuition.
images.purpose: Turns abstract correlation descriptions into recognizable scatter patterns.
